title: Provide vehicle technology information
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide vehicle technology information demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Obtain and evaluate aftermarket or integrated vehicle technology information

pcs.text: Locate and analyse vehicle and aftermarket accessory instructions to determine key operational features1.2 Access and follow workplace procedures1.3 Analyse vehicle operating instructions to identify operating procedures1.4 Review and update information relating to vehicle type and model operating instructions regularly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and analyse vehicle and aftermarket accessory instructions to determine key operational features1.2 Access and follow workplace procedures1.3 Analyse vehicle operating instructions to identify operating procedures1.4 Review and update information relating to vehicle type and model operating instructions regularly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and analyse vehicle and aftermarket accessory instructions to determine key operational features1.2 Access and follow workplace procedures1.3 Analyse vehicle operating instructions to identify operating procedures1.4 Review and update information relating to vehicle type and model operating instructions regularly.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Obtain and evaluate aftermarket or integrated vehicle technology information

elements.title: Communicate information to customers

pcs.text: Explain and demonstrate vehicle features, technology and functions to customers according to dealership procedures2.2 Simplify and communicate difficult to interpret operating instructions to customer2.3 Communicate key information to customer in a professional manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain and demonstrate vehicle features, technology and functions to customers according to dealership procedures2.2 Simplify and communicate difficult to interpret operating instructions to customer2.3 Communicate key information to customer in a professional manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain and demonstrate vehicle features, technology and functions to customers according to dealership procedures2.2 Simplify and communicate difficult to interpret operating instructions to customer2.3 Communicate key information to customer in a professional manner.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Communicate information to customers

elements.title: Record vehicle handover information

pcs.text: Record customer vehicle handover information and obtain sign-off according to workplace procedures3.2 Record information using workplace systems and procedures3.3 Supply key items and accessories to customer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record customer vehicle handover information and obtain sign-off according to workplace procedures3.2 Record information using workplace systems and procedures3.3 Supply key items and accessories to customer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record customer vehicle handover information and obtain sign-off according to workplace procedures3.2 Record information using workplace systems and procedures3.3 Supply key items and accessories to customer.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Record vehicle handover information

elements.title: Recommend and implement improvements to vehicle handover

pcs.text: Seek feedback on vehicle handover techniques and evaluate according to workplace procedures4.2 Review vehicle handover techniques regularly and implement improvements that maximise effective customer service and repeat business in line with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek feedback on vehicle handover techniques and evaluate according to workplace procedures4.2 Review vehicle handover techniques regularly and implement improvements that maximise effective customer service and repeat business in line with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek feedback on vehicle handover techniques and evaluate according to workplace procedures4.2 Review vehicle handover techniques regularly and implement improvements that maximise effective customer service and repeat business in line with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Recommend and implement improvements to vehicle handover
